entities.name: Castinellan
entries: The dominant language of the Castinellan Provinces{@sup ({@book PG|GrimHollowPG24|8|The Castinellan Provinces}/{@book CG|GrimHollowCG24|6})}. This language is also used for most of Etharis's religious texts. It was until recently considered a crime to translate the teachings of the Seraphs into a language other than Castinellan. Castinellan is also predominantly spoken in Morencia{@sup ({@book PG|GrimHollowPG24|8|The City of Morencia}/{@book CG|GrimHollowCG24|9})}, making it the most common language used in trade.

entities.name: Charneault
entries: The dominant language of the Charneault Kingdom{@sup ({@book PG|GrimHollowPG24|8|The Charneault Kingdom}/{@book CG|GrimHollowCG24|5})}.

entities.name: Higher Büräch
entries: The highborn dialect in the Büräch Empire{@sup ({@book PG|GrimHollowPG24|8|The Bürach Empire}/{@book CG|GrimHollowCG24|3})}. Most formal writings are in this dialect as well, such as religious texts, laws, royal decrees, plays and poems, etc. If a foreigner learns Büräch, this is the dialect they learn.

entities.name: Low Büräch
entries: The commoner's dialect in the Büräch Empire{@sup ({@book PG|GrimHollowPG24|8|The Bürach Empire}/{@book CG|GrimHollowCG24|3})}. It is more heavily accented than High Büräch, making the general population of the nation harder for foreigners to understand.

entities.name: Ostoy
entries: The dominant language of Ostoya{@sup ({@book PG|GrimHollowPG24|8|The Ostoyan Empire}/{@book CG|GrimHollowCG24|4})}.

entities.name: Valiki
entries: The dominant language of the Valikan Clans{@sup ({@book PG|GrimHollowPG24|8|The Valikan Clans}/{@book CG|GrimHollowCG24|7})}. Each of the clans speaks a slightly different dialect of Valiki, but each dialect is similar enough to make themselves understood.
